messages.author: swarm
messages.text:
What it is: A blocked role holding no ticket is dropped, not asked — its question reaches the human nowhere
What it solves: THE DEFECT. `diffNeedsApproval` (`extension/src/events/swarmEventStream.ts:97`) keys a gate
transition by the ticket the gated ROLE currently holds (`curr.roleTicket[gate.role]`) and
DELIBERATELY DROPS a gate it cannot tag, rather than guess a topic — see the comment at
`extension/src/concierge/con…
How it works: A blocked role holding no ticket still reaches the human

messages.author: swarm
